name: Widget Mode
helpText: grid, curtail, and revenue can compute from potential_power for the shared range. insurance keeps the latest-value path.

name: Override Title
helpText: Leave empty to use the mode's default title.

name: Override Subtitle
helpText: Leave empty to use the mode's default subtitle.

name: Currency Symbol (Revenue / Insurance)
helpText: Currency prefix for financial modes.

name: Energy Unit (Grid / Curtailment)
helpText: Unit suffix for energy modes.

name: Actual Power Keys
helpText: Comma-separated telemetry keys for exported/actual power in kW.

name: Setpoint Keys
helpText: Comma-separated setpoint keys. Values below 99.5 percent create curtailment ceilings.

name: Potential Power Keys
helpText: Comma-separated potential-power telemetry keys in kW. Negative values are ignored.

name: Tariff Attribute Key
helpText: Plant attribute in LKR/kWh. SERVER_SCOPE is read first, then SHARED_SCOPE.

name: Capacity Attribute Key
helpText: Plant capacity attribute used for curtailment ceiling calculations.

name: Fallback Capacity (kW)
helpText: Used when the capacity attribute is missing or invalid.

name: Lifetime Start Attribute Key
helpText: Reserved for plant COD/commissioning date. The selector falls back to Lifetime Start Date.

name: Lifetime Start Date
helpText: Fallback lifetime start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

name: Use precomputed loss keys

items.label: Auto (use if available, fall back otherwise)
Disable — always compute on the client (legacy)

helpText: Reads the daily/lifetime keys written by the Pvlib loss-rollup job. 'auto' silently falls back to per-minute fetch when keys are absent.

name: Lifetime Attribute Prefix
helpText: Prefix used to compose the six lifetime attribute names (e.g. loss_grid_lifetime_kwh). Change only if you renamed the attributes.

name: Background Refresh Interval (minutes)
helpText: Interval at which the card silently refreshes when the selected range includes today. Past-only ranges never auto-refresh. Match this to the service LOSS_TODAY_PARTIAL_INTERVAL_MIN for optimal freshness.

name: Capacity / Tariff Cache (minutes)
helpText: How long to cache the plant's Capacity and tariff_rate_lkr attributes between fetches. Reducing this increases TB load.

name: Severity: Medium Threshold
helpText: Value at or above this is MODERATE. Defaults: 100 for energy modes, 50000 for financial modes.

name: Severity: High Threshold
helpText: Value at or above this is HIGH. Defaults: 500 for energy modes, 200000 for financial modes.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the dynamic tooltip. Leave empty for context-aware tooltip.
